prestazioni: Upgrade the M838TE 3.8L twin-turbo V8 with a bespoke McLaren Special Operations (MSO) Stage 2 ECU calibration, targeting 650PS (641hp) at 7,500 RPM and 680Nm (502lb-ft) of torque at 5,000 RPM, utilizing a Motec M150 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping with ethanol flex-fuel capability (E85 compatible).

Install a pair of Garrett GT3076R Gen II turbochargers with billet compressor wheels (60mm inducer, 82mm exducer) and Inconel turbine wheels, paired with custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipes and a secondary cat-delete system by Armytrix for optimized exhaust flow and reduced backpressure.

Replace the stock intercoolers with a bespoke PWR Performance Products dual-core air-to-water intercooler system, featuring 100% aluminum construction, 4.5L capacity per side, and integrated water-methanol injection ports for consistent intake temperatures under sustained boost (targeting 35°C post-intercooler temps at 1.5 bar of boost).
estetica: Fit a Liberty Walk LB Works widebody conversion kit, specifically designed for the 540C, with carbon fiber front fenders (30mm wider), rear quarter panels (50mm wider), and a custom rear diffuser with integrated titanium exhaust tips by Akrapović.

Install a full carbon fiber MSO Heritage Edition front splitter, rear wing (20% larger than stock), and side skirts, all finished in a matte clear coat with exposed weave, paired with a custom Vorsteiner V-FF 107 20-inch forged wheels in a staggered setup (20x9 +40 front, 20x11 +45 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/35 R20 front, 305/30 R20 rear).

Apply a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with a satin finish, combined with a full MSO Carbon Black interior retrim featuring Alcantara headliner, carbon fiber door cards, and bespoke Recaro Pole Position seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses and a custom roll cage by Safety Devices.
